# Review, organizing data and other helpful tips        
June 5th, 2026  

## Kahoot! as review

Code on the whiteboard 


## Organizing data  

- [Data Organization in Spreadsheets](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/00031305.2017.1375989)
- Excel sheet 
- [Analyze as randomized—Why dropping block effects in designed experiments is a bad idea (Fret et al., 2024)](https://acsess.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/agj2.21570)

## Homework

- Homework is posted and due in a week
